subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My prison. Verily, He desireth to make mention of thee with a remembrance whose light hath shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه اراد ان یذکرک بذکر اذا اشرق نوره من افق
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
